subject: ToolReceiverState
adopted_concept: Transparent 2D and 3D-facing tool receiver state decals for first gimmick pedestal, locks, relays, and receiver pads.
product_line_role: Tool Receiver / Gimmick Pedestal state read
motif_limit_policy: State changes stay in socket opening, tab expansion, signal placement, and material temperature; no text, runic letters, magic circles, generic UI symbols, or external-IP motifs.

asset_request.source: inferred because no visual asset_request.yaml for this tool receiver state family was present in the checkout
out_of_scope_asset_requests: Assets/Art/ModelRigAnimation/Enemy/MeleeShardling/SealedLockRelic_v0.1.0/asset_request.yaml is a model/rig animation request and was not used for this receiver-state decal request.
asset_request.usage_context: FOURFOLD ECHOES first gimmick pedestal, tool relay, lock receiver, reward receiver pad, and state-material prototyping

constraints.texture_budget: 512px atlas for BaseColor/Mask/Normal/Emissive plus 256px per-state maps and 128px transparent state decals
constraints.tile_mode: not a loop tile; clamp transparent decals

prompt_contract:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Unity 2D transparent receiver-state decals plus 3D material atlas maps
Primary request: compact FOURFOLD ECHOES folded reliquary tool receiver states for first gimmick pedestal, no text, no decorative background
Style/medium: procedural 2D raster, transparent top-down decal and PBR-intent texture maps in the folded reliquary miniature product line
Subject: four tool receiver states built from low folded slabs, fourfold inlay seams, chunky tabs, input slit/socket, and one functional signal thread
Composition/framing: centered top-down silhouette, generous transparent padding, readable at 64px/128px/256px, 512px atlas quadrants
Color palette: ivory stone, warm gold, cool blue tool signal, resolved green signal, muted dormant stone; saturated but not neon
Materials/textures: broad color planes, bevel-like normal detail, sparse signal emission, no photoreal dirt, no noisy scan texture
Constraints: PNG maps, transparent outside silhouette, no labels, no letters, no watermark, no external IP style names, variations differ by silhouette/socket opening/tab shape/material temperature/signal placement rather than color alone
Avoid: generic magic circle, UI letters, inventory/crafting/quest symbols, thin wires, dense rune noise, photoreal grime, external-IP motif

unity_import.texture_type: Sprite (2D and UI) for transparent state decals; Default for BaseColor/Mask/Emissive; Normal Map for Normal textures

texture_maps.Mask_channels: R=occlusion/silhouette depth, G=roughness group, B=emissive mask, A=alpha/coverage

variants.name: Dormant
variants.difference: muted stone, closed input slit, compact silhouette

variants.name: Ready
variants.difference: open receiver socket, cool blue ready slit, warm gold inlay

variants.name: Active
variants.difference: expanded side latches, bright tool contact core, pulsing signal thread

variants.name: Solved
variants.difference: settled open basin, return-green resolved signal, low calm silhouette

qc.edge_bleed: transparent outside silhouette; no colored pixels on image border
qc.tile_seam: not applicable; clamp transparent decals, not loop tiles
